overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city intersection at night during light rain. The scene features towering skyscrapers with holographic advertisements, wet streets reflecting neon lights, and a dense urban atmosphere. The footage is from a video game engine, showcasing cinematic quality lighting and detailed futuristic architecture.

dense cluster of colorful neon signs and digital advertisements on building facade
tall palm tree trunk visible against the night sky
tall modern glass building with illuminated windows rising behind the circular structure

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy cyberpunk city intersection at night, with the camera walking forward toward a prominent cylindrical building covered in holographic ads. Neon signs glow on the left while wet asphalt reflects the colorful lights. The atmosphere is hazy with light rain falling.

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the wide intersection through marked crosswalks, passing a pedestrian in a green jacket who is looking at a wrist device. The ground shows glowing WALK signage. A red brick building becomes visible on the right while vehicles pass through the intersection. The circular holographic building looms closer ahead.

segments.scene_description: The camera reaches the far side of the intersection, approaching a red brick building with neon-lit benches in front. The circular building is now visible in the distance to the left. Overhead cables crisscross between the tall structures, and the wet pavement continues to reflect the neon lights.

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to reveal the towering skyscrapers disappearing into the fog and rain, with cables stretching overhead between buildings. After observing the vertical architecture, the camera turns around to face back toward the intersection, showing the circular building from the opposite side with the crosswalk visible ahead.

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera walking along the street past a speed limit 40 sign, with the circular holographic building visible ahead. A futuristic car drives through the wet intersection while neon signs glow on the surrounding buildings. The rain continues to fall, creating reflections on the pavement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a rainy cyberpunk intersection that shifts from a wide urban vista toward the detailed textures of a city sidewalk. It begins by walking forward through a hazy atmosphere, where wet asphalt reflects the glow of neon signs and a towering cylindrical building covered in holographic advertisements looms ahead. As the camera crosses the wide intersection through marked crosswalks, it passes a pedestrian in a green jacket and moves past glowing walk signage while vehicles navigate the street. The scene then shifts toward the far side of the crossing, bringing a red brick building and neon-lit benches into focus. Finally, the perspective settles beside the brick architecture as the circular holographic tower recedes into the distance to the left beneath a canopy of crisscrossing overhead cables.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that shifts from a dizzying vertical perspective of a cyberpunk skyline to a grounded walk through a rain-slicked city intersection. It begins with a tilt upward toward towering skyscrapers that vanish into a misty rain, highlighting a network of cables stretching between the buildings. As the camera pivots away from the heights, the view turns back toward the street to reveal a circular building and a crosswalk waiting ahead. The scene then transitions into a forward motion along the wet pavement, passing a speed limit sign while a futuristic car glides through the intersection. Finally, the camera advances toward the glowing holographic structure as neon signs cast vibrant reflections across the rainy asphalt.
